results.desc: H1 hook shape window.__budget {add,update,remove,list,balance}
H2 add() returns created tx with assigned id + fields
H3 list() new array of plain 6-field objects; mutation isolation
H8 balance() Number = income - expense (from list())
H4 update() applies fields, returns updated tx (same id)
H4/H6 update/remove unknown id -> null/false, no throw
H6 remove(id) -> true, drops the tx
invalid description (empty/whitespace) add() throws; state unchanged
invalid amount (0/neg/NaN/non-finite) add() throws; state unchanged
invalid type/category/date add() throws; state unchanged
update() invalid field throws atomically; state unchanged
self-contained: zero http(s) requests, no external refs in markup
zero console errors on fresh load
no alert/confirm/prompt/native dialogs
zero console errors across the full run
AC1 empty first load: list()=[], balance()=0, shows 0.00
AC1 form controls: type/description/amount#/>=4 categories/date
AC2 add income: balance +exact, row rendered, in localStorage
AC3 add expense: balance -exact, row rendered
AC4 balance = Sum(in)-Sum(ex), 2 decimals, balance() within 0.005
AC5 negative balance shown with leading minus, never clamped
AC5 negative balance visually distinct from non-negative
AC6 edit affordance per row
AC6 edit in place: same id, no dup, len same, balance+totals reflect
AC7 delete affordance per row
AC7 delete updates balance+totals; last delete -> empty state 0.00
AC8 total income & total expenses each exact (2 decimals)
AC8 per-category expense totals exact (2 decimals)
AC8 editing a category moves the amount between category totals
AC9 empty-description form submit adds nothing, no dialog
results.detail: nothing added on empty-description submit (in-page message wording: judge from screenshot)

results.desc: AC10 bad-amount form submit adds nothing, no dialog
results.detail: nothing added on amount 0/-5 submit (message wording: judge from screenshot)

results.desc: AC11 add survives reload: same ids, same balance
AC11 edit & delete survive reload; ids unchanged
AC15 ids unique, stable, addressed by id (not position)
AC16 corrupt/missing storage -> empty, no crash, no console error
